body: Phase 2 substrate online. Ready to test content workflow.
Drafts staged and humanized against _writing-signature/profile.md (em-dashes removed, no forbidden vocabulary, exclamation budget honored). 4 platforms.

Notion sync queued (not executed inline; per project policy, only notion-publisher agent may call Notion MCP). Targets: content_queue DB for the 3 platform drafts, newsletter_archive DB for the newsletter draft, research_digests DB for the notes file.

Pipeline complete for 'Cognitive load and Neurodiversity x Accessibility'. Domain: accessibility-ai (existing). 12 research items / 8 sources captured. 4 drafts staged (LinkedIn, Instagram carousel, X thread, Newsletter). All humanized against _writing-signature/profile.md. Notion sync queued for notion-publisher agent. 2 ideas added to ideas-feed.md. 5 NotebookLM prompts staged.

5 created, 0 updated, 0 skipped, 0 conflicts. Pages: LinkedIn(3530ee97-23c8-812a-a605-e7c249584585), Instagram(3530ee97-23c8-81ab-a1a0-f9c8e9a72f5c), X(3530ee97-23c8-819d-9ba0-f0970983dc45), Newsletter(3530ee97-23c8-8142-8571-eb10e07af32a), Research(3530ee97-23c8-81f5-b679-d84d7b5c43b4). All notion_page_id fields written back to local frontmatter.
